◎简　　介  

　　Four suicide bombers struck in central London on Thursday 7 July, killing 52 people and injuring more than 700. It was the first time British suicide bombers had launched an attack on civilians in their own country. It was the greatest loss of life in a British terrorist attack since the Lockerbie bombing in 1988.Adapted from Julie’s book, Frank McGuiness’s script is a moving ...
